headline: MasterCard and Visa Are 2 Stocks You Can Safely Buy and Hold Forever
summary: The buy-and-hold investment strategy stands as one of the most reliable paths to long-term wealth creation. It rewards patience by harnessing the power of compounding, allowing high-quality businesses to deliver consistent growth even through economic cycles, market corrections, and short-term noise. Investors who commit to exceptional companies avoid the pitfalls of timing the market and ... MasterCard and Visa Are 2 Stocks You Can Safely Buy and Hold Forever
